All files are correct. Here's what was done:

**Centralized in `Directory.Build.props`** — all 8 version properties now live in one place:

| Package | Old → New |
|---|---|
| System.Text.Json | 8.0.5 / 9.0.0 / 10.0.1 → **10.0.5** |
| Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.19.0 / 12.24.0 → **12.27.0** |
| Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting | 8.0.1 → **10.0.5** |
| Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 → **10.0.5** |
| NewtonsoftJson (net8.0) | 8.0.11 → **8.0.25** |
| OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | 1.15.0 → **1.15.1** |
| NewtonsoftJson (net6.0) | 6.0.36 ✓ (already latest) |
| xunit | 2.9.3 ✓ (already latest) |

**Key changes:**
- **No more hardcoded versions** in any `.csproj` — every project now uses `$(PropertyName)` references
- **Legacy project** aligned via properties (was using old inline 8.0.5 / 12.19.0)
- **Common.props** now uses `$(LoggingVersion)` instead of a hardcoded version
- **TFM-conditional** NewtonsoftJson in Api.csproj preserved, using separate properties per TFM
